title: HistRegGUI: Multiplatform Histological Image Registration with DeeperHistReg
description: HistRegGUI is a desktop interface for histological image registration with DeeperHistReg. It supports independent one-target batch registration and ordered cascading registration of consecutive sections, where each slice is registered to the previous warped slice. It provides streamed 1x-32x registration downsampling, CPU and optional NVIDIA CUDA execution, automatic and manual image-reader selection, batch/cascade manifests, and optional memory-efficient tiled BigTIFF OME-TIFF stack creation for 3-D visualization in software such as Imaris. Packaged applications are provided for Windows, Linux, macOS Intel, and macOS Apple Silicon.
